column1: # For partner use. All values traceable to primary source URLs listed per section.
# SECTION A: EPA Toxic Release Inventory -- Wayne County (2022 reporting year)
# SECTION B: PFAS Investigation Sites -- Wayne County (EGLE MPART 2024)
# Total PFAS investigation sites in Wayne County per EGLE MPART: 9. Detailed records above include only named/notable sites.
# SECTION C: EPA EJScreen ZCTA Snapshot -- Wayne County ZCTAs (EJScreen v2.3
# SECTION D: FEMA National Risk Index -- Wayne County (2023)
# SECTION E: Energy Burden -- Wayne County (ACEEE LEAD Tool 2023 / DOE)
# 1. TRI values are self-reported by facilities under EPCRA Section 313. Not all releases are hazardous at reported quantities.
# 2. EJScreen percentiles are relative to national distribution; they do not indicate absolute risk thresholds.
# 3. PFAS site counts reflect EGLE MPART investigation status as of 2024; not all sites have confirmed health impacts.
# 4. FEMA NRI expected annual loss is a modeled estimate based on historical hazard frequency and exposed assets.
# 5. Energy burden figures are modeled from utility billing and census income data. Individual household burden varies.
# 6. All data verified against primary source URLs listed per section. Generated 2026-04-10 by accessmi.org.
